questions.stem: The boy ______ is standing under the big tree is my new classmate.
questions.explanation: 本题考查定语从句关系代词的选择。先行词是'the boy'，指人，且在从句中作主语，因此用who。which用于指物；whose表示'谁的'，在从句中作定语；whom也指人，但只能作宾语。句意：站在大树下的那个男孩是我的新同学。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: I ______ the book already, so I can return it to the school library now.
questions.explanation: 本题考查现在完成时与一般过去时的区别。句中有already（已经）且强调过去动作对现在的影响（可以还书了），应用现在完成时have read。一般过去时只强调过去发生，与现在无关联；现在进行时和一般将来时不符合语境。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The flowers in the garden ______ by my grandfather every morning.
questions.explanation: 本题考查一般现在时的被动语态。主语'the flowers'是动作'water'的承受者，应用被动语态；由every morning可知用一般现在时，结构为am/is/are + 过去分词。主语是复数，故用are watered。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem:
—Do you know ______ he will come to the party tomorrow?
—I'm not sure. He ______ be busy with his study.
questions.explanation: 第一空考查宾语从句连接词，由答句'I'm not sure'可知表示'是否'，if和whether都可以，但第二空考查情态动词表推测，must表示肯定推测'一定'，can't表示否定推测'不可能'，might表示不确定'可能'。由'I'm not sure'可知是不确定推测，用might。whether常与or not搭配，也可单独使用表示'是否'。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: If you meet a new word while reading, you can ______ in the dictionary.
questions.explanation: 本题考查动词短语辨析。look up表示'查阅（词典、资料）'，代词it要放在中间，即look it up；look for表示'寻找'；look over表示'检查'。句意：阅读时遇到生词，你可以在词典里查阅它。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: It is ______ to reuse shopping bags instead of using plastic ones.
questions.explanation: 本题考查词性转换。系动词is后接形容词作表语；helpful表示'有帮助的，有益的'；helpless表示'无助的'。句意：重复使用购物袋而不是用塑料袋是有益的。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: We need to ______ some new ideas to solve this environmental problem.
questions.explanation: 本题考查短语动词辨析。come up with表示'想出（主意、办法）'；come up表示'走近，被提出'；come out表示'出版，出现'；come on表示'加油，快点'。由宾语'ideas'可知应选come up with。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school started a special project called "Green Campus Garden". The teachers wanted to teach us about environmental protection  (8) practical skills. We were divided into small groups, and each group got a small piece of land to  (9) .

At first, I thought it would be easy, but I was wrong. We had to learn how to prepare the soil and choose the right vegetables for the  (10) season. My group decided to grow tomatoes and carrots. We worked hard every day after school, watering the plants and removing weeds.

The most exciting moment came three weeks later when we saw the first green leaves  (11) from the soil. Everyone cheered loudly. Through this project, we not only learned gardening skills but also understood the  (12) of patience and teamwork.
questions.explanation: 考查介词辨析。through表示'通过（某种方式）'，强调通过某种方法或过程；with表示'用（工具）'；across表示'穿过（平面）'；by表示'通过（手段）'或'被'。句意：老师们想通过实践技能教我们环境保护。through practical skills表示'通过实践技能这种方式'。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school started a special project called "Green Campus Garden". The teachers wanted to teach us about environmental protection  (8) practical skills. We were divided into small groups, and each group got a small piece of land to  (9) .

At first, I thought it would be easy, but I was wrong. We had to learn how to prepare the soil and choose the right vegetables for the  (10) season. My group decided to grow tomatoes and carrots. We worked hard every day after school, watering the plants and removing weeds.

The most exciting moment came three weeks later when we saw the first green leaves  (11) from the soil. Everyone cheered loudly. Through this project, we not only learned gardening skills but also understood the  (12) of patience and teamwork.
questions.explanation: 考查动词短语辨析。look after表示'照顾，照料'；look for表示'寻找'；look at表示'看'；look up表示'查阅'。根据上下文，每组得到一块地应该是要'照料'它，种植蔬菜需要照顾，因此选look after。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school started a special project called "Green Campus Garden". The teachers wanted to teach us about environmental protection  (8) practical skills. We were divided into small groups, and each group got a small piece of land to  (9) .

At first, I thought it would be easy, but I was wrong. We had to learn how to prepare the soil and choose the right vegetables for the  (10) season. My group decided to grow tomatoes and carrots. We worked hard every day after school, watering the plants and removing weeds.

The most exciting moment came three weeks later when we saw the first green leaves  (11) from the soil. Everyone cheered loudly. Through this project, we not only learned gardening skills but also understood the  (12) of patience and teamwork.
questions.explanation: 考查形容词辨析。right表示'合适的，恰当的'；last表示'上一个的'；next表示'下一个的'；past表示'过去的'。句意：我们不得不学习如何准备土壤以及为合适的季节选择合适的蔬菜。right season表示'合适的季节'，符合种植常识。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school started a special project called "Green Campus Garden". The teachers wanted to teach us about environmental protection  (8) practical skills. We were divided into small groups, and each group got a small piece of land to  (9) .

At first, I thought it would be easy, but I was wrong. We had to learn how to prepare the soil and choose the right vegetables for the  (10) season. My group decided to grow tomatoes and carrots. We worked hard every day after school, watering the plants and removing weeds.

The most exciting moment came three weeks later when we saw the first green leaves  (11) from the soil. Everyone cheered loudly. Through this project, we not only learned gardening skills but also understood the  (12) of patience and teamwork.
questions.explanation: 考查动词短语辨析。come out表示'出现，长出'；fall表示'落下'；run表示'跑'；give up表示'放弃'。句意：最令人兴奋的时刻是三周后，当我们看到第一片绿叶从土壤中长出来时。come out from the soil表示'从土壤中长出来'，符合植物生长的语境。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Last month, our school started a special project called "Green Campus Garden". The teachers wanted to teach us about environmental protection  (8) practical skills. We were divided into small groups, and each group got a small piece of land to  (9) .

At first, I thought it would be easy, but I was wrong. We had to learn how to prepare the soil and choose the right vegetables for the  (10) season. My group decided to grow tomatoes and carrots. We worked hard every day after school, watering the plants and removing weeds.

The most exciting moment came three weeks later when we saw the first green leaves  (11) from the soil. Everyone cheered loudly. Through this project, we not only learned gardening skills but also understood the  (12) of patience and teamwork.
questions.explanation: 考查名词辨析。value表示'价值'；price表示'价格'；cost表示'成本，花费'；money表示'金钱'。句意：通过这个项目，我们不仅学到了园艺技能，还理解了耐心和团队合作的价值。the value of...表示'……的价值'，是固定搭配。
questions.label: 完形填空

questions.group_passage:
Plastic pollution has become one of the biggest environmental problems in the world. Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste flows into our oceans. This causes serious harm to sea animals. Many turtles, fish and birds mistake plastic bags for food and eat them by accident.

To solve this problem, scientists have developed new ways to recycle plastic. One creative method is turning plastic bottles into fabric (织物) for making clothes. Another idea is using special bacteria (细菌) that can break down plastic in months instead of hundreds of years. Some cities have also started programs to encourage people to sort their rubbish properly.

However, recycling alone is not enough. We should also reduce the use of single-use plastics like straws and cups. Remember, every small action counts. When you choose to bring your own shopping bag or water bottle, you are helping to protect our planet.
questions.stem: According to the passage, how much plastic waste goes into the oceans every year?
questions.explanation: 细节理解题。根据文章第一段第二句'Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste flows into our oceans.'可知，每年约有800万吨塑料垃圾流入海洋。注意million（百万）和thousand（千）的区别，以及数字8的准确读取。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解

questions.group_passage:
Plastic pollution has become one of the biggest environmental problems in the world. Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste flows into our oceans. This causes serious harm to sea animals. Many turtles, fish and birds mistake plastic bags for food and eat them by accident.

To solve this problem, scientists have developed new ways to recycle plastic. One creative method is turning plastic bottles into fabric (织物) for making clothes. Another idea is using special bacteria (细菌) that can break down plastic in months instead of hundreds of years. Some cities have also started programs to encourage people to sort their rubbish properly.

However, recycling alone is not enough. We should also reduce the use of single-use plastics like straws and cups. Remember, every small action counts. When you choose to bring your own shopping bag or water bottle, you are helping to protect our planet.
questions.stem: The underlined word 'break down' in Paragraph 2 probably means ______.
questions.explanation: 词义猜测题。根据上下文，科学家使用特殊的细菌来处理塑料，in months instead of hundreds of years（在数月内而不是数百年内），说明细菌能快速将塑料'分解'。break down在生物学语境中常表示'分解（物质）'。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测

questions.group_passage:
Plastic pollution has become one of the biggest environmental problems in the world. Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste flows into our oceans. This causes serious harm to sea animals. Many turtles, fish and birds mistake plastic bags for food and eat them by accident.

To solve this problem, scientists have developed new ways to recycle plastic. One creative method is turning plastic bottles into fabric (织物) for making clothes. Another idea is using special bacteria (细菌) that can break down plastic in months instead of hundreds of years. Some cities have also started programs to encourage people to sort their rubbish properly.

However, recycling alone is not enough. We should also reduce the use of single-use plastics like straws and cups. Remember, every small action counts. When you choose to bring your own shopping bag or water bottle, you are helping to protect our planet.
questions.stem: What can we infer from the last paragraph?
options: A. We should stop using all kinds of plastics immediately.
B. Bringing our own bags is the only way to help the environment.
C. Both recycling and reducing plastic use are important.
D. Single-use plastics are more expensive than reusable ones.
questions.explanation: 推理判断题。最后一段第一句'However, recycling alone is not enough. We should also reduce the use of single-use plastics...'说明仅靠回收是不够的，我们还需要减少使用一次性塑料，因此推断出回收和减少使用都很重要。A项'立即停止所有塑料'过于绝对；B项'唯一方式'错误；D项'价格比较'文中未提及。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断

questions.group_passage:
Plastic pollution has become one of the biggest environmental problems in the world. Every year, about 8 million tons of plastic waste flows into our oceans. This causes serious harm to sea animals. Many turtles, fish and birds mistake plastic bags for food and eat them by accident.

To solve this problem, scientists have developed new ways to recycle plastic. One creative method is turning plastic bottles into fabric (织物) for making clothes. Another idea is using special bacteria (细菌) that can break down plastic in months instead of hundreds of years. Some cities have also started programs to encourage people to sort their rubbish properly.

However, recycling alone is not enough. We should also reduce the use of single-use plastics like straws and cups. Remember, every small action counts. When you choose to bring your own shopping bag or water bottle, you are helping to protect our planet.
questions.stem: What is the best title for this passage?
options: B. How to Make Clothes from Plastic
questions.explanation: 主旨大意题。文章第一段讲塑料污染问题，第二段讲回收解决方案，第三段讲减少使用。因此最佳标题应涵盖'污染'和'解决方案'两方面。A项'塑料历史'未提及；B项'用塑料做衣服'只是细节；D项'濒危海洋动物'只是第一段内容。C项全面概括了文章主旨。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意

questions.group_passage:
Many students find it hard to balance their study and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they cannot finish homework on time because of hobby activities.  (17) Here are some useful tips.

First, make a weekly schedule. Write down all your school tasks and hobby time in a planner.  (18) This way, you won't forget important deadlines.

Second, learn to say no. If you have an exam coming next week, you might need to skip one hobby class.  (19) Your hobbies will still be there after the exam.

  (20) Even 15 minutes of reading or drawing can help you relax. Remember, hobbies are not a waste of time but a good way to refresh your mind.
options: A. However, never give up your hobbies completely.
B. Then, check your plan every day.
C. As a result, they give up their hobbies.
D. So, how can we solve this problem?
E. In addition, try to combine study with hobbies.
questions.explanation: 考查段落衔接。前一句提出学生难以平衡学习和爱好、感到压力的问题，后一句'Here are some useful tips'引出解决方案，因此此处需要承上启下的过渡句，提出问题如何解决的问句。D项'那么，我们如何解决这个问题呢？'符合逻辑。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Many students find it hard to balance their study and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they cannot finish homework on time because of hobby activities.  (17) Here are some useful tips.

First, make a weekly schedule. Write down all your school tasks and hobby time in a planner.  (18) This way, you won't forget important deadlines.

Second, learn to say no. If you have an exam coming next week, you might need to skip one hobby class.  (19) Your hobbies will still be there after the exam.

  (20) Even 15 minutes of reading or drawing can help you relax. Remember, hobbies are not a waste of time but a good way to refresh your mind.
options: A. However, never give up your hobbies completely.
B. Then, check your plan every day.
C. As a result, they give up their hobbies.
D. So, how can we solve this problem?
E. In addition, try to combine study with hobbies.
questions.explanation: 考查逻辑关系。前一句讲'在计划本中写下所有学校任务和爱好时间'，后一句讲'这样你就不会忘记重要的截止日期'，因此此处应填入与查看计划相关的句子。B项'然后，每天检查你的计划'符合上下文逻辑，then表示时间顺序。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Many students find it hard to balance their study and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they cannot finish homework on time because of hobby activities.  (17) Here are some useful tips.

First, make a weekly schedule. Write down all your school tasks and hobby time in a planner.  (18) This way, you won't forget important deadlines.

Second, learn to say no. If you have an exam coming next week, you might need to skip one hobby class.  (19) Your hobbies will still be there after the exam.

  (20) Even 15 minutes of reading or drawing can help you relax. Remember, hobbies are not a waste of time but a good way to refresh your mind.
options: A. However, never give up your hobbies completely.
B. Then, check your plan every day.
C. As a result, they give up their hobbies.
D. So, how can we solve this problem?
E. In addition, try to combine study with hobbies.
questions.explanation: 考查转折关系。前一句讲'如果下周有考试，你可能需要跳过一节爱好课'，后一句讲'考试后你的爱好还会在那里'，因此此处需要表示转折，说明只是暂时跳过而非完全放弃。A项'然而，永远不要完全放弃你的爱好'符合逻辑，however表示转折。
questions.label: 短文填空

questions.group_passage:
Many students find it hard to balance their study and hobbies. They often feel stressed when they cannot finish homework on time because of hobby activities.  (17) Here are some useful tips.

First, make a weekly schedule. Write down all your school tasks and hobby time in a planner.  (18) This way, you won't forget important deadlines.

Second, learn to say no. If you have an exam coming next week, you might need to skip one hobby class.  (19) Your hobbies will still be there after the exam.

  (20) Even 15 minutes of reading or drawing can help you relax. Remember, hobbies are not a waste of time but a good way to refresh your mind.
options: A. However, never give up your hobbies completely.
B. Then, check your plan every day.
C. As a result, they give up their hobbies.
D. So, how can we solve this problem?
E. In addition, try to combine study with hobbies.
questions.explanation: 考查递进关系。前面讲了First... Second...，此处应是第三条建议。后一句讲'即使15分钟的阅读或绘画也能帮助你放松'，说明可以利用碎片时间进行爱好活动，即把学习和爱好结合起来。E项'此外，尝试将学习与爱好结合起来'符合逻辑，in addition表示递进，引出第三条建议。
questions.label: 短文填空
